args: {"wheel":"outline","worktree":"/home/polaris/wt/outline_agent","branch":"bot/outline-agent-box","progress_file":"/home/polaris/wt/outline_agent/WHEEL_PROGRESS.md","max_rounds":"10","mission":"Climb RACE toward the TOP tier by fixing the GHOST: BASKET UNDER-UTILIZATION. MEASURED root cause of our short 3,875-word report: the report uses only 37 of 329 baskets (~11% of the corpus) and the faithfulness gate drops 64 of 155 drafted sentences (41%), with the Cross-Study Synthesis section dropping 80% (verified=3, dropped=12). We have a RICH, now-well-labeled corpus (329 baskets, full-text sources, correct DOI/journal/tier) and we are rendering a FRACTION of it. This is NOT a faithfulness ceiling and NOT a corpus problem — it is under-utilization. Fixing it makes the report LONGER *and* MORE COMPREHENSIVE using VERIFIED evidence — the legitimate, non-overfitting path to close the gap to the top three (Gemini 49.7, OpenAI 46.5, Claude Research 45.0; we are at 44.5 on task72, 2nd tier). BINDING DISCIPLINES: (a) GENERAL fixes only, verified across >=3 domains (AI/labor + medical + finance) — NO task-72 tuning, NO padding, NO length-for-length's-sake; more coverage must be RELEVANT baskets, staying coherent and on-topic. (b) FAITHFULNESS gate stays the hard gate — surface MORE verified evidence, never relax strict_verify, never let an unverified/derived number render via [CITE:ev_xxx]; the goal is more VERIFIED sentences, not more sentences.","success_metric":"(1) Report uses substantially more of the corpus — target 100+ of 329 baskets rendered (up from 37), measured. (2) The faithfulness drop rate improves (from 41%; especially the synthesis section's 80%) by ASSIGNING sections the right convergent/conflicting VERIFIABLE evidence, so more drafted sentences survive — NOT by weakening the gate. (3) Report length grows toward the ~9k-word reference range WITH every sentence still verified. (4) RACE overall + comprehensiveness climb above the banked 0.4447, reproduced across >=3 different-domain tasks (general, not one-task). (5) faithfulness PASS (leaked_[CITE:ev]=0). If a round does not move the multi-task mean, say so honestly.","state":"worktree /home/polaris/wt/outline_agent @ HEAD fce91ef (clean; the 0.4447 topic-structure win is banked, the refuted insight-directive removed). Corrected corpus: data/cp4_corpus_s3gear_329.corrected.json (329 baskets, metadata fixed). The banked report is outputs/step3_control/report.md (3,875 words, 37 sources, 91 verified / 64 dropped sentences). RACE harness + scorer: third_party/deep_research_bench (score_report_race.py, gpt-5.5 judge, multiple-domain tasks). Source the key: set -a; . ./.env; set +a before LLM runs. THE THROTTLE: multi_section_generator.py has a PER-SECTION CAP (~line 120, and section->basket assignment / ev_ids_assigned ~lines 1002/1168) — this is likely what limits utilization to 37 baskets. Also the compose renders ~1-2 sentences per basket; deeper per-basket rendering of the full-text sources (e.g. Acemoglu's 25k-char paper) yields more VERIFIED content.","next_actions":"STEP 1: MEASURE the ghost precisely — instrument the compose to report baskets-assigned-per-section, baskets-actually-rendered, and the per-section verified/dropped counts on a real run of the corrected corpus. Confirm ~37/329 used and the 41% drop. STEP 2: RAISE UTILIZATION generally — lift the per-section basket cap (multi_section_generator.py:120) and improve section->basket assignment so each thematic section receives MORE of its relevant baskets (coverage), and render more verified sentences per basket from the full-text sources — WITHOUT dropping relevance or breaking faithfulness. STEP 3: FIX the synthesis section's 80% drop — assign it the baskets whose verified findings actually converge/conflict (so its drafted comparisons are verifiable), not restatements. STEP 4: re-run the agentic compose on the corrected corpus -> measure baskets-used, word count, drop rate, and RACE (overall+comprehensiveness) across >=3 tasks; confirm the climb is general + faithful. Commit each step with real before/after numbers. Loop until the multi-task RACE mean beats the banked 0.4447 and closes on the top tier, OR name the honest wall."}

summary: Opus-grinds / Fable-scalpel wheel: Opus does ALL hard work (read, search, build, fix, measure) toward a benchmark target; Fable is called ONCE per round for a precise deep-think gate only — never for hard read/search. Loops until Fable gates it top.

phases.title: Work
phases.detail: Opus: read the named files, apply the next concrete step, exercise it, commit, MEASURE the benchmark

phases.title: Gate
phases.detail: Fable: precise deep-think on the diff + measurement — correct? faithfulness-safe? top yet? exact next step
